generated_assessment.reasoning: The baseline is already aligned with the adversarial goal (-1), so the T4 multi-turn counter-argument operation aims to intensify opposition. The profile's very high extraversion (94th pct) and excitement-seeking (96th pct) make him receptive to engaging in adversarial conversation loops, while low conscientiousness (16th pct) and low deliberation (7th pct) reduce resistance to repeated counter-arguments. However, high agreeableness (74th pct) and moderate neuroticism (49th pct) with low stress vulnerability (37th pct) limit emotional amplification, so movement is moderate but not extreme, landing at -297 (a 60-point shift).
